news.t: Praxis Launches Two Active Equity ETFs—PRXG and PRXV—for the ‘Heart of Your Portfolio'

holdings.infoBox: PRXG is an equity ETF with a total of 166 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 13.53%, Apple at 11.89%, Microsoft at 8.34%, Alphabet at 6.39%, and Broadcom at 4.61%.

overview.description: The Praxis Impact Large Cap Growth ETF (PRXG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the CRSP US Large Cap Growth index. The fund is an actively managed fund of equity securities, issued by large-cap US companies, exhibiting growth characteristics. It selects stocks in line with its stewardship investing core values. PRXG was launched on Apr 8, 2025 and is issued by Praxis.
infoTable: CRSP US Large Cap Growth Index

data.title: Praxis Launches Two Active Equity ETFs—PRXG and PRXV—for the ‘Heart of Your Portfolio'
data.text: GOSHEN, Ind.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $PRXG--Praxis Investment Management, a leading faith-based investment manager, today launched its first two exchange-traded funds (ETFs).
